title: cephalocereus tetetzo
intro: Cephalocereus tetetzo, also known as the pitaya cactus or dragon fruit cactus, is a species of cactus that belongs to the genus Cephalocereus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Cephalocereus tetetzo include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically harvested for its stems, which are then used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
